records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Royal Palace, The Empire of Arcadena.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Royal Palace, The Empire of Arcadena.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Royal Palace, The Empire of Arcadena.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that is what we've achieved in the northern continent, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that is what we've achieved in the northern continent, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that is what we've achieved in the northern continent, Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It may be a little bit early, but it seems that we are in a favorable position.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It may be a little bit early, but it seems that we are in a favorable position.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It may be a little bit early, but it seems that we are in a favorable position.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We should be able to rest easy for a while, as the enemies have lost their spirits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We should be able to rest easy for a while, as the enemies have lost their spirits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We should be able to rest easy for a while, as the enemies have lost their spirits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well done, Sir Allen. An impeccable display of commanding skills that fits the position of the Empire's Knight Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well done, Sir Allen. An impeccable display of commanding skills that fits the position of the Empire's Knight Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well done, Sir Allen. An impeccable display of commanding skills that fits the position of the Empire's Knight Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am not worthy of that praise. We have not achieved a complete victory, considering the amount of damage that we suffered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am not worthy of that praise. We have not achieved a complete victory, considering the amount of damage that we suffered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am not worthy of that praise. We have not achieved a complete victory, considering the amount of damage that we suffered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are plenty of remaining issues, including the one in <color=#ffd34c>Monte</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are plenty of remaining issues, including the one in <color=#ffd34c>Monte</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are plenty of remaining issues, including the one in <color=#ffd34c>Monte</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How does one see the forest if one cannot see the trees?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How does one see the forest if one cannot see the trees?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How does one see the forest if one cannot see the trees?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Marquise Martinez. What is the outlook on the western border areas?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Marquise Martinez. What is the outlook on the western border areas?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Marquise Martinez. What is the outlook on the western border areas?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We bribed an officer in the rebel forces, as per your order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We bribed an officer in the rebel forces, as per your order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We bribed an officer in the rebel forces, as per your order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were a disorderly group of power-hungry fools, so it is only a matter of time before their troops fall apart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were a disorderly group of power-hungry fools, so it is only a matter of time before their troops fall apart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were a disorderly group of power-hungry fools, so it is only a matter of time before their troops fall apart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was nothing special on my side either, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was nothing special on my side either, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was nothing special on my side either, Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The continued news of victory must have lifted the people's spirits. They look a lot brighter than before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The continued news of victory must have lifted the people's spirits. They look a lot brighter than before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The continued news of victory must have lifted the people's spirits. They look a lot brighter than before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about you, Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about you, Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about you, Lucrecia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lucrecia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have nothing special to report either, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have nothing special to report either, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have nothing special to report either, Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How deplorable of you to be distracted during the council assembly. Are you aware that your face tells a different story?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How deplorable of you to be distracted during the council assembly. Are you aware that your face tells a different story?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How deplorable of you to be distracted during the council assembly. Are you aware that your face tells a different story?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Speak, Lucrecia. Was there a problem in the village?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Speak, Lucrecia. Was there a problem in the village?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Speak, Lucrecia. Was there a problem in the village?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that whoever dances together at the ball will later become husband and wife!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that whoever dances together at the ball will later become husband and wife!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that whoever dances together at the ball will later become husband and wife!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to muster up some courage to ask my crush.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to muster up some courage to ask my crush.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to muster up some courage to ask my crush.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about you, Your Holiness?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about you, Your Holiness?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about you, Your Holiness?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was actually something minor that happened, not really worth mentioning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was actually something minor that happened, not really worth mentioning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was actually something minor that happened, not really worth mentioning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Pray tell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Pray tell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Pray tell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw some children who played knights and roleplayed as us in the city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw some children who played knights and roleplayed as us in the city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw some children who played knights and roleplayed as us in the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was very funny to see you get beat up by the Savior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was very funny to see you get beat up by the Savior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was very funny to see you get beat up by the Savior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha! Then did the child playing the Saintess wear something excessively revealing like a certain someone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha! Then did the child playing the Saintess wear something excessively revealing like a certain someone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha! Then did the child playing the Saintess wear something excessively revealing like a certain someone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Empire has become unruly. The young ladies must be taught how to dress properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Empire has become unruly. The young ladies must be taught how to dress properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Empire has become unruly. The young ladies must be taught how to dress properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-excessively revealing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-excessively revealing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-excessively revealing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch your tone, Lucrecia. Your position as Saintess does not excuse any rude behavior toward His Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch your tone, Lucrecia. Your position as Saintess does not excuse any rude behavior toward His Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch your tone, Lucrecia. Your position as Saintess does not excuse any rude behavior toward His Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is fine. It's always the quiet ones. Or, I guess the obscene ones, in this case.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is fine. It's always the quiet ones. Or, I guess the obscene ones, in this case.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is fine. It's always the quiet ones. Or, I guess the obscene ones, in this case.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It does not seem to require my attention, so we shall move on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It does not seem to require my attention, so we shall move on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It does not seem to require my attention, so we shall move on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Allen. What happened to the matter I told you to prepare?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Allen. What happened to the matter I told you to prepare?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Allen. What happened to the matter I told you to prepare?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The victory banquet is being prepared according to plan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The victory banquet is being prepared according to plan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The victory banquet is being prepared according to plan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, I heard some disappointed voices among the soldiers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, I heard some disappointed voices among the soldiers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, I heard some disappointed voices among the soldiers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why? I thought everyone loved it last time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why? I thought everyone loved it last time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why? I thought everyone loved it last time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every year around this time, the Empire of Arcadena hosts a ball to wish for the peace and stability of the royal family.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every year around this time, the Empire of Arcadena hosts a ball to wish for the peace and stability of the royal family.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every year around this time, the Empire of Arcadena hosts a ball to wish for the peace and stability of the royal family.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is one of the biggest events in the Empire, so the masses must be disappointed to skip the ball.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is one of the biggest events in the Empire, so the masses must be disappointed to skip the ball.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is one of the biggest events in the Empire, so the masses must be disappointed to skip the ball.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is such a shame not to be able to see Allen's dancing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is such a shame not to be able to see Allen's dancing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is such a shame not to be able to see Allen's dancing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: His flamenco with Grace is well known throughout the Empire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: His flamenco with Grace is well known throughout the Empire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: His flamenco with Grace is well known throughout the Empire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please let it side. It is closer to violence than dancing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please let it side. It is closer to violence than dancing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please let it side. It is closer to violence than dancing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, considering the circumstances, we must save resources and retain the least bit of tension.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, considering the circumstances, we must save resources and retain the least bit of tension.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, considering the circumstances, we must save resources and retain the least bit of tension.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ball can be organized after the war.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ball can be organized after the war.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ball can be organized after the war.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong, Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong, Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong, Lucrecia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have a different opinion, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have a different opinion, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have a different opinion, Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The importance of a ball lies in the display of the royal family's prosperity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The importance of a ball lies in the display of the royal family's prosperity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The importance of a ball lies in the display of the royal family's prosperity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now is the time, when the enemy's forces have subsided. What better way to raise the morale of the soldiers than with a ball?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now is the time, when the enemy's forces have subsided. What better way to raise the morale of the soldiers than with a ball?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now is the time, when the enemy's forces have subsided. What better way to raise the morale of the soldiers than with a ball?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ho-oh. Does the Saintess wish to indulge in luxury with our subjects' taxes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ho-oh. Does the Saintess wish to indulge in luxury with our subjects' taxes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ho-oh. Does the Saintess wish to indulge in luxury with our subjects' taxes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dismissed. The knights are supposed to protect the Empire, not dance and carouse the night away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dismissed. The knights are supposed to protect the Empire, not dance and carouse the night away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dismissed. The knights are supposed to protect the Empire, not dance and carouse the night away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe you were the one who suggested the banquet, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe you were the one who suggested the banquet, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe you were the one who suggested the banquet, Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a budget issue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is a budget issue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is a budget issue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you wish to indulge yourself in luxury and pleasure, I suggest you make use of that indecent body of yours to seduce the other priests.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you wish to indulge yourself in luxury and pleasure, I suggest you make use of that indecent body of yours to seduce the other priests.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you wish to indulge yourself in luxury and pleasure, I suggest you make use of that indecent body of yours to seduce the other priests.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or that peasant over there, if you wish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or that peasant over there, if you wish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or that peasant over there, if you wish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's sacrilegious, Your Highness! The Savior is not that kind of person!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's sacrilegious, Your Highness! The Savior is not that kind of person!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's sacrilegious, Your Highness! The Savior is not that kind of person!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. It would be wise not to run your lowly mouth any further.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. It would be wise not to run your lowly mouth any further.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. It would be wise not to run your lowly mouth any further.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are knights gathered for the common goal of slaying the Demon Lord. Not some riff-raff who only seek pleasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are knights gathered for the common goal of slaying the Demon Lord. Not some riff-raff who only seek pleasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are knights gathered for the common goal of slaying the Demon Lord. Not some riff-raff who only seek pleasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We shall move on from this subject. Or are there any objections?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We shall move on from this subject. Or are there any objections?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We shall move on from this subject. Or are there any objections?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I concur, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I concur, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I concur, Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I do as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I do as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I do as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. That will be all for today's assembly. Go get some rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. That will be all for today's assembly. Go get some rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. That will be all for today's assembly. Go get some rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A trying journey awaits you tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A trying journey awaits you tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A trying journey awaits you tomorrow.

root.m_Talk_FRA: However, considering the circumstances, we must save resources and retain the least bit of tension.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ball can be organized after the war.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ball can be organized after the war.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ball can be organized after the war.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong, Lucrecia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong, Lucrecia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong, Lucrecia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have a different opinion, Your Highness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have a different opinion, Your Highness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have a different opinion, Your Highness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The importance of a ball lies in the display of the royal family's prosperity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The importance of a ball lies in the display of the royal family's prosperity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The importance of a ball lies in the display of the royal family's prosperity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now is the time, when the enemy's forces have subsided. What better way to raise the morale of the soldiers than with a ball?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now is the time, when the enemy's forces have subsided. What better way to raise the morale of the soldiers than with a ball?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now is the time, when the enemy's forces have subsided. What better way to raise the morale of the soldiers than with a ball?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ho-oh. Does the Saintess wish to indulge in luxury with our subjects' taxes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ho-oh. Does the Saintess wish to indulge in luxury with our subjects' taxes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ho-oh. Does the Saintess wish to indulge in luxury with our subjects' taxes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dismissed. The knights are supposed to protect the Empire, not dance and carouse the night away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dismissed. The knights are supposed to protect the Empire, not dance and carouse the night away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dismissed. The knights are supposed to protect the Empire, not dance and carouse the night away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe you were the one who suggested the banquet, Your Highness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe you were the one who suggested the banquet, Your Highness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe you were the one who suggested the banquet, Your Highness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is a budget issue.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is a budget issue.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a budget issue.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you wish to indulge yourself in luxury and pleasure, I suggest you make use of that indecent body of yours to seduce the other priests.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you wish to indulge yourself in luxury and pleasure, I suggest you make use of that indecent body of yours to seduce the other priests.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you wish to indulge yourself in luxury and pleasure, I suggest you make use of that indecent body of yours to seduce the other priests.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or that peasant over there, if you wish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or that peasant over there, if you wish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or that peasant over there, if you wish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's sacrilegious, Your Highness! The Savior is not that kind of person!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's sacrilegious, Your Highness! The Savior is not that kind of person!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's sacrilegious, Your Highness! The Savior is not that kind of person!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. It would be wise not to run your lowly mouth any further.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. It would be wise not to run your lowly mouth any further.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. It would be wise not to run your lowly mouth any further.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are knights gathered for the common goal of slaying the Demon Lord. Not some riff-raff who only seek pleasure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are knights gathered for the common goal of slaying the Demon Lord. Not some riff-raff who only seek pleasure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are knights gathered for the common goal of slaying the Demon Lord. Not some riff-raff who only seek pleasure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We shall move on from this subject. Or are there any objections?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We shall move on from this subject. Or are there any objections?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We shall move on from this subject. Or are there any objections?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I concur, Your Highness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I concur, Your Highness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I concur, Your Highness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I do as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I do as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I do as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. That will be all for today's assembly. Go get some rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. That will be all for today's assembly. Go get some rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. That will be all for today's assembly. Go get some rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A trying journey awaits you tomorrow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A trying journey awaits you tomorrow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A trying journey awaits you tomorrow.
